html:
Exclusive to:

The Obsidian Armor is an armor from the Shipwrecked DLC. It requires 1 Log Suit, 5 Obsidian and 1 Dragoon Heart to craft. Like all items in the Volcanic Tab, it cannot be prototyped and the player must be wearing a Brain of Thought or be near an Obsidian Workbench to craft it again.

The armor acts similarly to the Scalemail from the Reign of Giants DLC. It grants fire immunity to the wearer and will ignite attackers, however unlike Scalemail, it does not restore sanity while worn. It has 1350 durability and absorbs 70% of physical damage.

Gallery

  • Wilson wearing Obsidian Armor.
  • Willow wearing Obsidian Armor.
  • Wolfgang wearing Obsidian Armor.
  • Wendy wearing Obsidian Armor.
  • WX-78 wearing Obsidian Armor.
  • Wickerbottom wearing Obsidian Armor.
  • Woodie wearing Obsidian Armor.
  • Wes wearing Obsidian Armor.
  • Maxwell wearing Obsidian Armor.
  • Wigfrid wearing Obsidian Armor.
  • Webber wearing Obsidian Armor.
  • Walani wearing Obsidian Armor.
  • Warly wearing Obsidian Armor.
  • Wilbur wearing Obsidian Armor.
  • Woodlegs wearing Obsidian Armor.
  • Wilba wearing Obsidian Armor.
  • Wormwood wearing Obsidian Armor.
  • Wheeler wearing Obsidian Armor.
  • Warly wearing Obsidian Armor and a Thulecite Crown.

“I'm a genius.”
–Wilson
“Hit me and BURN!”
–Willow
“Is cheap trick, but Wolfgang like!”
–Wolfgang
“Is it wise to don a suit of fire stone?”
–Wendy
“INCENDIARY DEFENCE SYSTEM”
–WX-78
“Be careful, it's sharp!”
–Wickerbottom
“Hot stuff, eh?”
–Woodie
“I've bent the flame to my will.”
–Maxwell
“The reptilian heart and obsidian have imbued it with incendiary properties.”
–Wagstaff
“Cöme at me nöw, fiends!”
–Wigfrid
“Our enemies will feel the heat!”
–Webber
“It kinda pokes my butt.”
–Walani
“Heavy and hot.”
–Warly
“It be heavy 'n hot.”
–Woodlegs
“'TIS FWOOSHIE ARMOR”
–Wilba
“Fire clothes”
–Wormwood
“I feel like I'm wearing a volcano.”
–Wheeler
The Obsidian Armor is an armor from the Shipwrecked DLC. It requires 1 Log Suit, 5 Obsidian and 1 Dragoon Heart to craft. Like all items in the Volcanic Tab, it cannot be prototyped and the player must be wearing a Brain of Thought or be near an Obsidian Workbench to craft it again.
The armor acts similarly to the Scalemail from the Reign of Giants DLC. It grants fire immunity to the wearer and will ignite attackers, however unlike Scalemail, it does not restore sanity while worn. It has 1350 durability and absorbs 70% of physical damage.

It requires 1 [[Log Suit]], 5 [[Obsidian]] and 1 [[Dragoon Heart]] to craft. Like all items in the [[Volcanic Tab]], it cannot be prototyped and the player must be wearing a [[Brain of Thought]] or be near an [[Obsidian Workbench]] to craft it again. The armor acts similarly to the [[Scalemail]] from the ''[[Don't Starve: Reign of Giants|Reign of Giants]]'' DLC. It grants fire immunity to the wearer and will ignite attackers, however unlike Scalemail, it does not restore sanity while worn. It has 1350 durability and absorbs 70% of physical damage. =={{Pic|32|Blueprint}} Gallery== Obsidian Armor Wilson.png|[[Wilson]] wearing Obsidian Armor.
